title: pouteria oxyedra
intro: Pouteria oxyedra, also known as the White Pouteria or White Padauk, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pouteria oxyedra include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Pouteria oxyedra can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
